name: Dockwa Marina Management API
what_it_does: Dockwa REST API for marina reservation and management platform. Enables AI agents to manage slip and mooring availability, process transient and seasonal boat reservations, retrieve vessel and boater profiles, handle marina billing and payments, manage amenity bookings, integrate marina data with harbor operations, and connect reservation data with navigation apps and boating communities.
use_cases: Managing slip availability and reservations from marina operations agents
Processing transient boater check-ins and billing from harbor management agents
Retrieving vessel profiles and boater history from marina service agents
Syncing marina availability with boating navigation apps from distribution agents
not_for: Commercial shipping ports without recreational marina focus
Dry storage facilities without wet slip management
best_when: A marina or yacht club using Dockwa wants AI agents to automate slip reservations, transient guest check-ins, seasonal billing, and amenity management.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Vessel registration and boater personal data is sensitive. Marina safety regulations vary by state — automated operations must comply with local harbormaster requirements.

auth.notes: Dockwa uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Marina-level credentials. Partner program for integration development. Used by marina software integrators and navigation app developers.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for marinas to join; Dockwa takes transaction fees on reservations
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction fee model on reservations; premium marina management features on paid plans
pricing.notes: Boston-based company, founded 2014. Largest marina reservation network in the US with 1,000+ marinas. Primarily a marketplace/network with management tools. Strong integration with boating apps (Navionics, Active Captain).

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Vessel registration and boater personal data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key or OAuth2
Marketplace + SaaS hybrid — some APIs serve marketplace functions, others marina management
US-focused marina network — limited support for international marina operations
Seasonal reservation patterns require careful availability logic (annual slips vs transient)
Harbormaster and USCG regulations affect what automated operations are permitted
agent_readiness.security_notes: Boater personal and vessel registration data. PCI-DSS. API key and OAuth2. US data residency. Marketplace and marina management hybrid.

security_score_components.security_notes: Boater and vessel data. PCI-DSS. API key and OAuth2. US data residency only.
